examples: A few products, like oleomargarine and tea, were controlled by individual laws.
Butter won, and oleomargarine was taxed and placed under other restraints that persisted on the Federal level until 1950.
Other examples are: the fat of meats, bone-marrow, suet (the best found around the loin and kidneys of the beef creature), cocoanut butter, butterine, and oleomargarine .
